---
title: "Projects"
listing:
  - id: connectome
    contents:
      - connectome.qmd
      - neuview.qmd
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 2
    sort:
      - "priority"
    fields: [title, description, categories]
    categories: false
  - id: experiments
    contents:
      - freely-walking-optomotor.qmd
      - nested-rf.qmd
      - burnett-2024.qmd
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 2
    sort:
      - "priority"
    fields: [title, description, categories]
    categories: false
  - id: developmental
    contents:
      - madm.qmd
      - enteric.qmd
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 2
    sort:
      - "priority"
    fields: [title, description, categories]
    categories: false
  - id: docs
    contents:
      - reiser-documentation.qmd
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 2
    sort:
      - "priority"
    fields: [title, description, categories]
    categories: false
---

## <img src="../assets/icons/fly.svg" class="section-icon" alt=""> Fruit Fly Connectome

::: {#connectome}
:::

## <img src="../assets/icons/eye.svg" class="section-icon" alt=""> Visual Neuroscience Experiments

::: {#experiments}
:::

## <img src="../assets/icons/cell.svg" class="section-icon" alt=""> Developmental Neuroscience Experiments

::: {#developmental}
:::

## <img src="../assets/icons/book.svg" class="section-icon" alt=""> Documentation

::: {#docs}
:::
